# WhisperShortcut 7.4

## Installation

Download the latest build from [Releases](https://github.com/mgsgde/whisper-shortcut/releases).

## Changes

### Google tools

- **Richer tool confirmations**: Calendar and task creation now return full creation details to chat, making successful Google tool actions easier to verify.

### Documentation

- **Current project overview**: The README now reflects the current app: Dictate, Dictate Prompt, Read Aloud, Prompt & Read, Chat with Gemini and Grok, Google integrations, Live Meeting, Smart Improvement, and local Whisper.
- **Privacy and terms refresh**: Privacy and terms documentation now describes xAI/Grok, Google OAuth, local chat/session storage, Smart Improvement data, and the canonical app data path.
- **Agent guidance cleanup**: Cursor and Claude rules, commands, skills, and release setup docs now match the current Swift/Xcode repo layout, rebuild flags, data directories, and release workflow.

## Full changelog

[Compare v7.3.2…v7.4](https://github.com/mgsgde/whisper-shortcut/compare/v7.3.2...v7.4)
